full_text:
Qiu Ben 丘本
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qiu Ben (丘本). Advisor to Deng Ai, calms him down and advises to try and surprise Zhuge Zhan. Qiu Ben may not have existed in history. Qiu Ben was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
